rulings.Case Title: UMPQUA BANK VS. XELAN PROP 1, LLC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Termination Of Receivership Release Of Remaining Receivership Estate Funds And Authorization To Claim Deficiency In Related Proceeding
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 21, 2024 line 1. OTHER KEVIN SINGER NOTICE OF MOTION FOR TERMINATION OF RECEIVERSHIP RELEASE OF REMAINING RECEIVERSHIP ESTATE FUNDS AND AUTHORIZATION TO CLAIM DEFICIENCY IN RELATED PROCEEDING is transferred to department 302 to be heard on April 4, 2024 at 9:30 a.m. per the order of the presiding judge. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: GSPA LLC VS. KAMERON FRUGOLI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And Document Production, And Request For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 21, 2024 line 5. PLAINTIFF GSPA LLC NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY RESPONSES AND DOCUMENT PRODUCTION, AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS is GRANTED, subject to opposition. Defendant shall provide complete verified responses without objections to Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories and Request for Production within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $460. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849).
